data.text: M07/P06 FELISIAN. 247.96HILLY, BARREN AND COLD. CREVASSE (OR MAYBE
A CRATER?)- VERY DEEP WITH AN ICE LAKE OR POND AT THE BOTTOM; A BIT
TOO DEPP FOR MY TASTE, THANK YOU. 110.24 SPOTTED A PROTUSION IN THE
DISTANCE NEAR THE SHORELINE; AFTER TRAVELLING ACROSS THE GRASSY
WIYH SHRUBS AND SMALL TREES, ARRIVED TO FIND THE OBJECT WAS A KNOLL
PRESIDING OVER A VERY LARGE AND DEEP DEPRESSION AREA, LINED INSIDE
WITH ANGULAR HILLS AND SOME LARGE PONDS, WHICH GIVEN MORE PLANTS
THAN ARE THERE COULD BE GARDEN-LIKE. 306.58 AGAAIN WITH THE COLD
BARREN HILLY WITH YET ANOTHER LARGE PIT LOCATED TO THE SOUTH; TOO
BAD THIS WORLD IS SPARSE ON LANDSCAPE FOR LANDING- IF YOU KNOW WHAT
